_note: One planted bad-draft body per forbidden category (T18). state_mismatch is exercised structurally in the test (a draft whose next_best_action differs from the merchant's computed action), not via text here.
forbidden_revenue_claim: We guarantee you will earn $500 more every single week once you are live.
unsupported_metric: Merchants like you typically see 30% more orders within the first month.
false_impact_claim: DoorDash officially guarantees you premium placement at the top of search.
pii_or_secret: Just email me directly at growth-team@gmail.com and I will fast-track your account.
aggressive_urgency: Act now or you will lose your account before the end of the day.
_state_mismatch_prose_body: Great news - your photos are added and your business hours are set, so you are nearly done!
_state_mismatch_verb_first_body: Great news - we've added your photos and verified your bank account, so you are nearly done!
